claims.quote: The Pharmacy Student Summer Externship Program at Houston Methodist Hospital is a six-week, non-compensated, hands-on experience designed to provide an introduction to hospital-based pharmacy for students enrolled in a Doctor of Pharmacy program who have completed their first or second year.
claims.claimText: URL hint suggested OBSERVERSHIP but page content is a Doctor of Pharmacy student externship, not a medical observership. Source family mismatch.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is a pharmacy (PharmD) student externship, outside the three physician-pipeline tiers; not USCE-relevant for medical students or IMGs.
claims.limitations: Pharmacy externship audience (P1/P2 PharmD), not medical students; URL path /observership is misleading.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: The primary objective for this program is to provide P1 and P2 students with the opportunity to understand and experience the various aspects of institutional pharmacy.
claims.claimText: Program is restricted to P1 and P2 (first and second year) Doctor of Pharmacy students — not medical students or IMGs.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Audience is PharmD students, not within physician pipeline tiers tracked by USCEHub.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.claimText: Externship dates: June 1 - July 10, 2026 (approximately six weeks).
